creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
(In reply to Andrew Turner from comment #9)
> Can you try running "set vm.pmap.superpages_enabled=0" in loader before booting.

I added vm.pmap.superpages_enabled=0 to /etc/loader.conf.
The command is now running. At the moment ~23 times longer than it used to
take to trigger the panic. I'll report again when it finishes.
